strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud systems
Demonstrated open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
Proven ability to learn and deploy new technologies quickly (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, MCP)
concerns: No evidence of direct AI/ML product development or platform ownership beyond incidental tooling contributions
Lacks documented experience in cloud architecture strategy or advising enterprise customers on AI adoption
No advanced degree in AI or related field; education is BS in CS with unrelated undergraduate degree in photography
response.justification: Despite broad engineering experience and open-source initiative, the candidate shows no evidence of leading or owning AI-powered products, advising on cloud-AI strategy, or possessing advanced AI credentials — all core requirements for a director-level AI strategy role — making their fit for this position fundamentally weak.
